items.quote: PLACEHOLDER — Clara is the only sitter our anxious rescue Pepper has ever felt comfortable with. We came home to a happy, relaxed dog and a spotless house.
items.author: Sample Client A.

items.quote: PLACEHOLDER — Daily photos, perfect medication tracking, and so much love. We won't travel without booking Clara first.
items.author: Sample Client B.

items.quote: PLACEHOLDER — Reliable, kind, and great with our two big goofy labs. Highly recommend.
items.author: Sample Client C.
